rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0001
rows.name:
Master was in a good mood today.
Hana talked with Master 16 times.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0002
rows.name:
Also, Hana talked with
Homura 31 times...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0003
rows.name: What are you doing, Hana?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0004
rows.name:
Kagutsuchi... Hana is keeping
a diary, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0005
rows.name:
Hana decided to keep records
like Kagutsuchi, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0006
rows.name:
But Hana, you don't return to a Core Crystal
like us or risk losing your memories, right?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0007
rows.name:
Hana's body is packed with delicate machines, mo.
If head damaged, records may be lost, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0008
rows.name:
I see... Your body looks useful,
but comes with its own problems.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0009
rows.name:
Yes, Hana is the world's most high-maintenance
girl with a selfish body, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0010
rows.name:
"Selfish body"...? Honestly,
Tora must have taught you that too...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0011
rows.name: Um...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0012
rows.name:
Why does Kagutsuchi care so much
about records of the past, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0014
rows.name:
Hana started a diary too, but doesn't know
what to write. Please teach Hana, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0015
rows.name: How should I answer?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0016
rows.name: I don't want to lose who I am...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0017
rows.name:
It's because I want to
remain who I am...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0101
rows.name:
Will Kagutsuchi disappear
without a diary, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0102
rows.name:
If Kagutsuchi returns to a Core Crystal,
won't you return as Kagutsuchi again, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0103
rows.name: But is that really true?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0104
rows.name:
If I return to my Core Crystal
and a very long time passes...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0105
rows.name:
All the people who know me
would eventually be gone.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0106
rows.name:
If that era's Kagutsuchi loses her memories
and fades from everyone else's...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0107
rows.name:
If no one knows or remembers me,
can I truly say I existed then?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0108
rows.name: Hmmmm...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0109
rows.name:
You're right, it would be impossible
to prove Kagutsuchi existed, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0110
rows.name:
Exactly. If no one knows me,
it's as if I never existed.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0111
rows.name: You know, that made me feel lonely.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0112
rows.name:
Because the time I spent with dear people
shaped who I am.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0113
rows.name:
Happy memories, sad memories...
together, they all make up who I am.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0114
rows.name:
Losing them all would deny both myself
and my dear people from that time.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0115
rows.name:
Master taught Hana so many things, mo.
Hana would hate to forget them, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0116
rows.name:
Hana is filled with everything
Master has taught her, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0117
rows.name:
Exactly. That's why a diary full of memories
is more precious than anything.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0118
rows.name:
It's a precious bond linking people,
the world, and yourself.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0119
rows.name:
I understand, mo! Hana will work hard
on keeping a diary too, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0120
rows.name:
Hana will make lots of memories
with Kagutsuchi and everyone, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0121
rows.name:
Yes. Let's leave plenty
of memories behind.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0201
rows.name: Mo-mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0202
rows.name:
Kagutsuchi is Kagutsuchi,
and no one else, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0203
rows.name:
Say Hana forgot all memories with Tora
and then called someone else Master...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0204
rows.name:
Would that new Hana be the same
as the Hana who was with Tora?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0205
rows.name: Hmmm... Hana is Hana, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0206
rows.name:
But that Hana would serve a new Master,
not the same as Hana now, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0207
rows.name:
That Hana probably wouldn't wear
frilly maid outfits either, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0208
rows.name:
W-well, maid outfits aside,
you've got the right idea.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0209
rows.name:
Every Kagutsuchi may be me,
but each era has a separate Kagutsuchi.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0210
rows.name:
My existence doesn't continue
as one unbroken thread.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0211
rows.name: I see, Hana understands now, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0212
rows.name:
Kagutsuchi keeps a diary so she can stay
the same Kagutsuchi forever, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0213
rows.name: Exactly.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0214
rows.name:
Even if I return to my Core
Crystal and lose my memories...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0215
rows.name:
With the diary, the next
Kagutsuchi can continue to be me.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0216
rows.name:
Though only because the Superbian Empire
preserves and passes down my diary...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0217
rows.name:
Kagutsuchi... How should Hana
pass down Hana's diary, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0218
rows.name: Leaving it to Tora seems... risky.

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0219
rows.name:
Master might use it as a pillow for naps
or as a pot stand, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0220
rows.name:
It seems we also need to find
a way to preserve yours...

rows.label: kizunatalk041_msg0221
rows.name:
Keeping Hana's daily diary from going
to waste sounds hard too, mo...
